flattened_note: The Ohio IT-1040 bundle (13 pages) is fully flattened — zero AcroForm fields, zero widget annotations. Both the original bundle (1040-bundle.pdf) and the amended bundle (1040-amended-bundle.pdf) have zero fillable fields. Ohio pushes taxpayers to its OH|TAX eServices portal (https://tax.ohio.gov/individual/ohtax-eservices) for electronic filing. Verified 2026-04-12.
